text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Grass Wonder and I have come to a shrine.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Whenever I pray at a shrine, there's something
important I like to keep in mind.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Yes. When we pray, it should be for the sake of
others. Any benefit to ourselves is only a happy
bonus.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
The tradition goes that Japanese deities respond
best to prayers for the land and its people as a
whole.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
I've been told it is improper to pray only for
yourself.
choice_data_list: That's a nice way of thinking.
That's a nice way of thinking.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
It's only one point of view, of course, but I
believe the deities will take notice if I honor it.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
According to an old Japanese saying, compassion
for others is always rewarded. I find it to be a
wonderful sentiment. ♪
choice_data_list: I'll give it a shot, too.
I'll give it a shot, too.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Oh, you will? Then let's go offer our prayers
together. ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Reflecting carefully on Grass Wonder's words, I
pray for the prosperity of all Umamusume in their
races.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Whew... All done. The rest depends on the gods'
temperament.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
One should always do their best... but sometimes
a little divine aid is the push you need. ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Considering how committed she is to doing her
best, I'm sure the gods will provide their
blessings.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Whew... We're all done now, but...

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Oh dear. Perhaps the gods aren't in the best of
moods?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The two of us run back to the academy in the
pouring rain.
